title: selaginella polymorpha
intro: Selaginella polymorpha, also known as Spikemoss, is a type of non-vascular, evergreen plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various respiratory issues and skin problems. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which provide numerous health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating bronchitis, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Selaginella polymorpha is often used in infusions, decoctions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
